idea-plugin.name: JavAI Extensions Support
idea-plugin.description:
Teaches IntelliJ IDEA about the members javai-substrate's ByteBuddy weaver adds to a @JavAIVectorizable-annotated class at class-load time -- the JavAIVectorizable/ JavAIDirtyTracking contract methods, plus a per-@Vectorize-field <field>Vector() accessor -- so the editor stops reporting "cannot resolve method" for code that is correct and works at runtime, without requiring a cast through JavAIVectorizable/JavAIDirtyTracking first.

This plugin only affects IDE analysis (inspections, autocomplete, navigation). It does not run, call, or depend on the real weaver, and changes nothing about how your project actually compiles or runs. See doc/spec/intellij-plugin.md in the javai repository for the full design.
